gaps: The story does not mention performance expectations.
The story does not specify who approves the generated output.

testSuites.name: Refinement output coverage
testSuites.acceptanceCriterion: The response includes the required sections in the exact order.

testCases.name: Render all refinement sections
preconditions: A refinement note set is available.
steps: Paste messy notes into the refinement form.
testCases.expectedResult: The response includes the required sections in the requested order.
testData: Refinement notes from a backlog discussion

testCases.name: Reject missing notes
testCases.expectedResult: The UI blocks submission and asks for notes before refinement can continue.

testCases.name: Handle very short note input
steps: Enter a single sentence or fragment.
testCases.expectedResult: The output still renders the structured story package and flags missing detail as needed.

testSuites.name: Onboarding answer coverage
testSuites.acceptanceCriterion: The agent cites the document it used and falls back when the answer is missing.

testCases.name: Return cited onboarding guidance
preconditions: At least one onboarding document exists in the fixture set.
steps: Enter a role and first-week question.
testCases.expectedResult: The answer cites the relevant document names and provides a concise response.

testCases.name: Report missing documentation
preconditions: The requested topic is not in the document set.
steps: Ask a question that does not match any document.
testCases.expectedResult: The agent says the information was not found and suggests a likely person or channel.
testData: What is our release road map?

testCases.name: Handle empty question
testCases.expectedResult: The UI blocks submission and prompts for a question before searching documents.
